mapper.select: SELECT data FROM nation_war WHERE id = #{id} AND server_id = #{serverId}
SELECT id, data FROM nation_war WHERE server_id = #{serverId}
SELECT nation FROM player_nation WHERE od_user_id = #{odUserId} AND server_id = #{serverId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM player_nation WHERE od_user_id = #{odUserId} AND server_id = #{serverId}
SELECT merit FROM player_merit WHERE od_user_id = #{odUserId} AND server_id = #{serverId}
SELECT city_id AS cityId, owner FROM nation_war_city_owner WHERE server_id = #{serverId}
SELECT nation, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM player_nation WHERE server_id = #{serverId} GROUP BY nation
